title: Square Feet to Square Meters Converter
description: Industrial-grade area conversion tool with precision adjustments, tolerance analysis, and data confidence scoring based on ISO 80000-1 and Six Sigma measurement standards.

inputs.label: Area in Square Feet
inputs.businessContext: Total area to be converted from imperial to metric units. Typical range for industrial floors, warehouses, or production cells.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total area to be converted from imperial to metric units. Typical range for industrial floors, warehouses, or production cells.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İmperial birimlerden metrik birimlere dönüştürülecek toplam alan. Endüstriyel zeminler, depolar veya üretim hücreleri için tipik aralık.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtfläche, die von imperialen in metrische Einheiten umgerechnet werden soll. Typischer Bereich für Industrieböden, Lagerhallen oder Produktionszellen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Superficie totale à convertir des unités impériales en unités métriques. Plage typique pour les sols industriels, entrepôts ou cellules de production.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total a convertir de unidades imperiales a métricas. Rango típico para pisos industriales, almacenes o celdas de producción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المساحة الإجمالية المراد تحويلها من الوحدات الإمبراطورية إلى المترية. النطاق النموذجي للأرضيات الصناعية أو المستودعات أو خلايا الإنتاج.

inputs.label: Measurement Accuracy Class
inputs.businessContext: Defines the tolerance level of the original measurement per ISO 2768-1. Affects confidence interval and hidden loss drivers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Defines the tolerance level of the original measurement per ISO 2768-1. Affects confidence interval and hidden loss drivers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 2768-1'e göre orijinal ölçümün tolerans seviyesini tanımlar. Güven aralığını ve görünmeyen kayıp sürücülerini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Definiert die Toleranzstufe der ursprünglichen Messung nach ISO 2768-1. Beeinflusst das Konfidenzintervall und die Treiber für verborgenen Verlust.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Définit le niveau de tolérance de la mesure d'origine selon la norme ISO 2768-1. Affecte l'intervalle de confiance et les facteurs de perte cachée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Define el nivel de tolerancia de la medición original según ISO 2768-1. Afecta el intervalo de confianza y los impulsores de pérdida oculta.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يحدد مستوى التفاوت للقياس الأصلي وفقًا لـ ISO 2768-1. يؤثر على فاصل الثقة ومحركات الخسائر غير المرئية.

inputs.label: Rounding Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the final result. Industrial standards often require 2-4 decimals for engineering documentation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the final result. Industrial standards often require 2-4 decimals for engineering documentation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai sonuç için ondalık basamak sayısı. Endüstriyel standartlar mühendislik dokümantasyonu için genellikle 2-4 ondalık basamak gerektirir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für das Endergebnis. Industriestandards erfordern oft 2-4 Dezimalstellen für technische Dokumentation.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat final. Les normes industrielles exigent souvent 2 à 4 décimales pour la documentation technique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el resultado final. Los estándares industriales a menudo requieren 2-4 decimales para documentación de ingeniería.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المنازل العشرية للنتيجة النهائية. المعايير الصناعية غالبًا تتطلب 2-4 منازل عشرية للتوثيق الهندسي.

inputs.label: Include Tolerance Band
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, the output will include upper and lower tolerance limits based on measurement accuracy class.

businessContext_i18n.en: If enabled, the output will include upper and lower tolerance limits based on measurement accuracy class.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etkinleştirilirse, çıktı ölçüm doğruluk sınıfına göre üst ve alt tolerans limitlerini içerir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn aktiviert, enthält die Ausgabe obere und untere Toleranzgrenzen basierend auf der Messgenauigkeitsklasse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si activé, la sortie inclura les limites de tolérance supérieure et inférieure basées sur la classe de précision de mesure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si está habilitado, la salida incluirá límites de tolerancia superior e inferior basados en la clase de precisión de medición.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إذا تم التمكين، سيتضمن الإخراج حدود التفاوت العلوية والسفلية بناءً على فئة دقة القياس.

rules.message: Area must be greater than zero.
Area exceeds maximum allowed value (1,000,000 ft²).
Low accuracy measurements should not be rounded to more than 2 decimal places per ISO 80000-1.

thresholds.message: Low measurement accuracy detected. Consider re-measurement for critical applications.
Large area detected. Verify measurement method (e.g., laser vs tape) to avoid cumulative errors.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
